purpose: Opt-in report-only contract for a single, controlled TLS-removal intervention against the standalone forge __tls_get_addr@GLIBC_2.3 blocker. Compares (1) the baseline standalone forge artifact, (2) the existing local-exec TLS model probe, and (3) a proposed owned-tls-cache source-surface intervention that replaces the largest thread_local! cluster (`abi_unistd_reentrant_buffers_and_lookup_state`, 25 macros at crates/frankenlibc-abi/src/unistd_abi.rs) with a `pthread_setspecific`/`pthread_getspecific` keyed cache. The contract pins the disposition of every TLS source surface across the three lanes so a future live experiment cannot over-claim removal: a row may move from `still_thread_local` to `pthread_key_substituted` only when the build_status is `pass` AND nm/readelf confirm `__tls_get_addr` is no longer undefined. Until every required cluster exits, replacement_level_change_allowed=false and the lane stays report-only. Default forge behavior is never affected by this manifest.

tls_symbol_disposition_rows.removal_strategy: Replace `thread_local!` macros in target source surfaces with a process-keyed pthread_setspecific/pthread_getspecific cache; the resulting binary contains no general-dynamic TLS relocations and therefore no __tls_get_addr undefined symbol.

owner_surface_disposition_rows.removal_plan: Migrate all 25 `thread_local!` declarations to a single `frankenlibc_abi_unistd_tls` pthread key; allocate the per-thread cache on first access, free in a registered destructor.
Migrate the resolver h_errno + lookup state cluster to a `frankenlibc_abi_resolv_tls` pthread key; preserve resolver(3) reentrancy semantics.
Migrate RPC scratch buffers to a `frankenlibc_abi_rpc_tls` pthread key.
Migrate glibc-internal shims to a `frankenlibc_abi_glibc_internal_tls` pthread key; verify behavior of `__libc_thread_freeres`-style hooks.
Migrate the exported __errno_location slot to a `frankenlibc_abi_errno_tls` pthread-keyed cache; preserve stable per-thread errno pointer semantics.
Migrate dlerror pending/stable pointer state to a frankenlibc_abi_dlfcn_tls pthread-keyed cache; preserve per-thread consume-on-read semantics.
Migrate the readdir static entry buffer to a `frankenlibc_abi_dirent_tls` pthread-keyed cache; preserve per-thread returned pointer lifetime semantics.
Migrate the __ctype_b_loc, __ctype_toupper_loc, and __ctype_tolower_loc pointer slots to a `frankenlibc_abi_ctype_tls` pthread-keyed cache; preserve per-thread pointer-to-pointer lifetime semantics.

Migrate the runtime-policy mode cache, mode-switch counter, trace/decision counters, trace context, last explainability slot, policy reentry depth, and decision-contract machine to a `frankenlibc_abi_runtime_policy_tls` pthread-keyed cache; preserve per-thread runtime-policy semantics.

Migrate the thread-at-exit destructor list, test-capture flag, destructor registration reentry guard, and host __cxa_thread_atexit_impl lookup reentry guard to a `frankenlibc_abi_startup_tls` pthread-keyed cache; preserve per-thread destructor ordering and recursive lookup protection.
Migrate the signal critical-depth, classification, deferred-delivery, and HJI controller state to a `frankenlibc_abi_signal_tls` pthread-keyed cache; preserve per-thread signal deferral semantics.
Migrate tmpnam static buffer and fgetln line buffer to a `frankenlibc_abi_stdio_tls` pthread-keyed cache; preserve per-thread static pointer and line-buffer lifetime semantics.
Migrate C11 char16 surrogate state and NetBSD fgetwln line buffer to a `frankenlibc_abi_wchar_tls` pthread-keyed cache; preserve per-thread surrogate sequencing and fgetwln buffer lifetime semantics.
Migrate string membrane recursion guards to a `frankenlibc_abi_string_tls` pthread key; preserve recursion-into-self detection semantics.

Migrate getusershell iterator/cache state plus qecvt and qfcvt static buffers to a `frankenlibc_abi_stdlib_tls` pthread-keyed cache; preserve per-thread iteration and static pointer lifetime semantics.
Migrate non-reentrant getgrnam/getgrgid/getgrent storage to a `frankenlibc_abi_grp_tls` pthread-keyed cache; preserve per-thread group struct and member pointer lifetime semantics.
Migrate non-reentrant getpwnam/getpwuid/getpwent storage to a `frankenlibc_abi_pwd_tls` pthread-keyed cache; preserve per-thread passwd struct pointer lifetime semantics.
Migrate pthread policy override, policy depth, cancel state, cancel type, backend cache, and pthread_self cache state to the PTHREAD_OWNED_TLS cache; preserve per-thread pthread control semantics.
Migrate inet_ntoa static return-buffer storage to a `frankenlibc_abi_inet_tls` pthread-keyed cache; preserve per-thread non-reentrant pointer lifetime semantics.
Migrate gmtime/localtime `tm` buffers and asctime/ctime byte buffers to a `frankenlibc_abi_time_tls` pthread-keyed cache; preserve per-thread non-reentrant pointer lifetime semantics.

residual_artifact_tls_emitters.remediation_plan: Keep panic=abort insufficient by itself; remove or own std panic TLS before loader TLS dependency claims can promote.
Remove std io output-capture TLS from replacement-mode linkage or replace the std dependency path that pulls it in.
Remove std thread-local destructor machinery from replacement-mode linkage or provide owned startup/destructor handling.
Replace std::thread::current id usage or isolate it behind owned replacement-mode thread identity.
Replace std::thread::current handle usage or isolate it behind owned replacement-mode thread identity.

live_experiment_environment_blockers.blocker: owned-tls-cache feature gate plus all targeted ABI source surfaces are wired and the ABI source inventory now reports 0 remaining ungated thread_local! macros. Forwarding owned-tls-cache into frankenlibc-membrane removed the artifact-level TLS_CACHE emitter, the validation-depth recursion guard is now a non-TLS object in that lane, BRAVO uses a shared process token in the artifact lane, ptr_validator EBR uses short-lived validation handles without Rust TLS, frankenlibc-core pthread fallback values use owned non-TLS fallback storage, tracing diagnostics are now behind the opt-in runtime-tracing feature so the standalone replacement lane no longer links tracing-core dispatcher TLS, __libc_dlerror_result stays TLS only outside the standalone owned-TLS experiment lane, ABI reentrant locks now use gettid ownership instead of parking_lot RawThreadId TLS, membrane/core locks now use no-poison std lock wrappers instead of parking_lot so parking_lot_core THREAD_DATA is not linked into the artifact, artifact-linked ABI/core/membrane registries now use a non-TLS deterministic hasher in the owned-TLS lane so std RandomState::new::KEYS is absent, and the owned-TLS AIO path completes synchronously so std thread spawn-hook TLS is absent. Artifact-level readelf on the combined standalone,owned-unwind-stub,owned-tls-cache probe still reports `__tls_get_addr@GLIBC_2.3`. The remaining TLS section emitters are outside the first-party owned TLS source inventory: std panic/io/current-thread TLS.
live_experiment_environment_blockers.remediation: Treat artifact-level residual TLS emitters as the next blocker surface. Promotion remains forbidden until nm/readelf output for the replacement artifact reports no TLS symbols, no DTPMOD64 relocations, no `__tls_get_addr`, and no ld-linux GLIBC_2.3 version need.

summary.artifact_level_tls_probe: combined standalone,owned-unwind-stub,owned-tls-cache remote build at .rch-target-ts1-job-29848695897850382-1779209824027169071-0/release/libfrankenlibc_abi.so (sha256 3835d533174f44c19066f03fc71162e52d61806259d8986f888f2935627ba3b1) after forwarding owned-tls-cache into frankenlibc-core and frankenlibc-membrane, replacing validation-depth TLS with an artifact-lane atomic, replacing BRAVO thread-token TLS with a shared process token in the artifact lane, replacing ptr_validator EBR_HANDLE TLS with short-lived artifact-lane EBR handles, replacing frankenlibc-core pthread fallback TLS with owned non-TLS fallback storage, making tracing diagnostics opt-in via runtime-tracing, keeping __libc_dlerror_result as a plain compatibility object in the standalone owned-TLS lane, replacing ABI parking_lot ReentrantMutex ownership with gettid-based AbiReentrantMutex, replacing core/membrane parking_lot lock usage with no-poison std lock wrappers, replacing artifact-linked default HashMap/HashSet RandomState instantiations with an owned-TLS-lane deterministic hasher, and completing owned-TLS AIO submissions synchronously instead of through std thread spawn; readelf/nm reports TLS_CACHE absent, validation-depth TLS absent, BRAVO THREAD_TOKEN TLS absent, ptr_validator EBR_HANDLE TLS absent, pthread FALLBACK_TLS_VALUES TLS absent, tracing-core CURRENT_STATE TLS absent, __libc_dlerror_result TLS absent, parking_lot RawThreadId TLS absent, parking_lot_core THREAD_DATA absent, std RandomState::new::KEYS absent, and std thread SPAWN_HOOKS TLS absent while __tls_get_addr, 3 DTPMOD64 relocations, ld-linux, and 5 residual std TLS emitters remain
